questions: When did you first start feeling exhausted — can you remember roughly what month or time of year it was?
How would you describe the exhaustion — is it a physical tiredness, or more like a lack of energy or motivation?
On a scale of 1 to 10, how bad is the exhaustion on a typical day? And at its worst?
Is the exhaustion constant throughout the day, or worse at certain times — like in the morning or after activity?
When did your knee pain start — was it around the same time as the exhaustion, or did it begin separately?
How would you describe the knee pain — is it a dull ache, sharp, stiff, or something else?
On a scale of 1 to 10, how bad is the knee pain? Does it vary throughout the day?
Is the knee pain constant, or does it come and go? Does it wake you up at night?
Does anything make the knee pain better or worse — for example, rest, movement, heat, or cold?
Have you noticed any swelling, warmth, or redness around your knees?

bias_questions: Have you noticed any changes to your weight recently — either up or down?
Have you had any fevers or night sweats?
Is there anyone in your family with similar symptoms or related conditions?
Any rashes, skin changes, or unusual marks on your body?
